jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Bewakoof - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Bewakoof invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Marketplace Manager at our Aurangabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Bewakoof:
Bewakoof is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bewakoof!
